summary: Frontend testing completed for Export Excel functionality across all 4 modules. All export buttons are working correctly using the xlsx library to generate .xlsx files.

issues: Chart components showing console warnings about width/height being -1 - charts may not render properly on initial load

critical_code_review_comments: The excelExport.js utility is well-structured with proper error handling and returns boolean success status
All modules correctly import and use the export functions from excelExport.js
The xlsx library is properly installed (version 0.18.5) and file-saver (version 2.0.5) for download functionality
seed_data_creation: No seed data created - used existing CFDI with $11,600.00 MXN
context_for_next_testing_agent: Export Excel functionality verified working in all 4 modules: CFDI/SAT (export-excel-btn), Cobranza y Pagos (export-payments-btn), Aging CxC/CxP (export-aging-btn), and Proyecciones (export-projections-btn). All buttons trigger xlsx file generation with proper toast notifications.

payments_module.note: Correct behavior - no payments data to export

projections_module.toast_message: Proyección exportada a Excel en MXN
